spec.query:
from(bucket: "satelliteTelemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "batt_a_voltage")

from(bucket: "satelliteTelemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |>filter(fn: (r)=> r._measurement=="mqtt_consumer")
  |>filter(fn: (r)=> r._field=="batt_a_temp")
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Battery_A_Temp")

from(bucket: "satelliteTelemetry")
   |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |>filter(fn: (r)=> r._measurement=="mqtt_consumer")
  |>filter(fn: (r)=> r._field=="batt_b_temp")
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Battery_B_Temp")

  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |>filter(fn :(r)=> r._measurement=="mqtt_consumer")
  |>filter(fn :(r)=> r._field=="batt_a_current")
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Battery_A_Current")

from (bucket: "satelliteTelemetry")

  |>filter(fn: (r)=>r._field=="power_consumption")

from(bucket: "satelliteTelemetry")

  |>filter(fn: (r)=> r._measurement=="mqtt_consumer")
  |>filter(fn: (r)=> r._field=="obc_temp")

from(bucket: "satelliteTelemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |>filter(fn:(r)=>r._measurement=="mqtt_consumer")
  |>filter(fn:(r)=>r._field=="batt_a_current")
  |>aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: count, createEmpty: false)

options.content:
📡 Frames Received: 337

spec.query:
from(bucket: "satelliteTelemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |>filter(fn :(r) => r._measurement=="mqtt_consumer")
  |>filter(fn :(r) => r._field=="batt_a_voltage")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: float(v: r._value) / 1000.0 }))
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Battery_A_Voltage")

from(bucket: "satelliteTelemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |>filter(fn :(r) => r._measurement=="mqtt_consumer")
  |>filter(fn :(r) => r._field=="batt_b_voltage")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: float(v: r._value) / 1000.0 }))
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Battery_B_Voltage")
